mapper.select: SELECT U.USER_ID AS userId, U.NICKNAME AS nickname, U.EMAIL AS email, U.DELETED_YN AS deletedYn, UR.ROLE AS role FROM SOCIAL_ACCOUNT SA JOIN USERS U ON SA.USER_ID = U.USER_ID JOIN USER_ROLES UR ON U.USER_ID = UR.USER_ID WHERE SA.PROVIDER_CD = #{provider} AND SA.PROVIDER_UID = #{providerId} AND U.DELETED_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SOCIAL_ACCOUNT ( USER_ID, PROVIDER_CD, PROVIDER_UID, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_AT, UPDATED_BY ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{provider}, #{providerId}, NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId} )
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID AS userId, PROVIDER_CD AS provider, PROVIDER_UID AS providerId FROM SOCIAL_ACCOUNT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND PROVIDER_CD = #{provider}
